items.definition_en: A small device used to make calls and send messages.
items.example_en: She always carries her mobile phone in her pocket.

items.definition_en: A portable computer you can use on your lap or table.
items.example_en: He takes his laptop to work every day.

items.definition_en: A flat, touch-screen computer without a keyboard.
items.example_en: The children love watching videos on the tablet.

items.definition_en: A pair of devices worn over the ears to listen to sound.
items.example_en: He listens to music using his headphones.

items.definition_en: A device used for taking photos or making videos.
items.example_en: She took many pictures with her new camera.

items.definition_en: A device used to supply power to your electronics.
items.example_en: Don't forget to pack your phone charger.

items.definition_en: A small device used to control a computer screen.
items.example_en: He bought a new mouse for his computer.

items.definition_en: A set of keys used for typing on a computer.
items.example_en: The keyboard on her laptop is very quiet.

items.definition_en: A machine that puts text or pictures onto paper.
items.example_en: We need more paper for the printer.

items.definition_en: A device for watching shows and movies at home.
items.example_en: They watched football on the big television.

items.definition_en: A handheld tool to control electronic devices from a distance.
items.example_en: He lost the remote control for the TV.

items.definition_en: A device that plays sound loudly.
items.example_en: The speaker in the living room is very loud.

items.definition_en: Small devices you put in your ears to hear sound.
items.example_en: He puts his earphones in to listen to music.

items.definition_en: A watch with computer functions and a screen.
items.example_en: Her smartwatch can track her steps and calls.

items.definition_en: A machine used for playing video games on a screen.
items.example_en: They play video games on their new game console.

items.definition_en: A device used to record or transmit sound.
items.example_en: She uses a microphone to sing in the studio.

items.definition_en: A screen used to display computer images and videos.
items.example_en: The monitor on her desk is very large.

items.definition_en: A portable battery used to charge devices.
items.example_en: He keeps a power bank in his backpack.

items.definition_en: A device that gives wireless internet to your home.
items.example_en: The router helps everyone connect to Wi-Fi.

items.definition_en: A small device for saving and moving files.
items.example_en: She saves her homework on a USB stick.
